text.title: Benefits Realization Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a symptom (observable signal) with root cause and concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: PM listed as benefit owner because no business stakeholder volunteered.
antipattern.fix: Refuse hand-off until business owner named.
Capture baseline pre-go-live or mark benefit unmeasurable.
